patterns.category_cn: 边界/范围检查错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A single overlap flag is computed by cross-comparing an input-range bound with an output-range bound (e.g. input end vs output start).
patterns.fix_pattern: Split the check into two independent booleans (isOverLapInput / isOverLapOutput). A new range can be recorded only when it does not overlap with either input or output ranges.
verification_hints: Locate all addrRange overlap comparisons in the target pass.
Confirm input/output ranges are checked independently, not cross-checked.
Add cases with adjacent but non-overlapping ranges and cases with partial overlaps.

patterns.category_cn: 函数语义与命名/实现不符
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A helper method name describes a different condition than its body actually tests, causing callers to make wrong decisions.
patterns.fix_pattern: Rename the helper to match its real semantics (e.g. HasUnexecutedProducer -> IsUnusedTensor) and update all call sites.
verification_hints: Read the body of every boolean helper used in the failing condition.
Check whether the function name accurately describes the returned value.
Trace all callers to see if they assume the old (wrong) semantics.

patterns.category_cn: 累加/赋值错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A statistic field is overwritten with '=' inside a function that may be called multiple times, instead of being incremented.
patterns.fix_pattern: Change the assignment to a compound assignment (+=) so repeated calls accumulate correctly.
verification_hints: Search for size/counter fields that are assigned in loops or repeated cleanup functions.
Check whether the field is expected to be monotonically increasing across calls.
Add a UT that triggers the cleanup path more than once.

patterns.category_cn: OPCode 特判缺失
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A reshape->assemble reorder utility handles a whitelist of opcodes and silently skips or mishandles a newly appearing opcode (OP_SUB).
patterns.fix_pattern: Add the missing opcode to the handled set and adjust the downstream shape/attr logic accordingly.
verification_hints: List every opcode that reaches the failing utility.
Check whether any opcode falls through a switch/if chain without explicit handling.
Add a UT containing the missing opcode in the reshape->assemble path.

patterns.category_cn: validshape 推导错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: When merging views, the validshape is inferred from the wrong tensor source or the dynamic-to-static conversion ignores an op-level attribute.
patterns.fix_pattern: Use the op attribute's ToDynValidShape when deriving the merged view's validshape; ensure the source tensor and the target dynamic shape are aligned.
verification_hints: Dump the validshape before and after the merge.
Check whether ToDynValidShape is being used from the op attribute.
Add dynamic-shape cases where the merged views have different valid shapes.

patterns.category_cn: dtype/数据搬移路径错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A spill buffer uses the source tensor's dtype for the intermediate GM buffer, but the reload target expects a different dtype. The conversion is then attempted on a copy path that does not support dtype conversion.
patterns.fix_pattern: Set the GM dtype of the spill buffer to match the reload target, so dtype conversion happens on copyOut (fixpipe) instead of copyIn (MTE2). Group consumers by dtype when necessary.
verification_hints: Trace the spill path: source -> GM -> reload target.
Confirm which copy direction supports dtype conversion (copyOut/fixpipe vs copyIn/MTE2).
Check all consumers of the spilled tensor for dtype differences.

patterns.category_cn: 视图/Reshape 合并条件错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A reshape or assemble node is merged under conditions that do not cover multi-input/output, dynamic shapes, or axis-combine padding scenarios.
patterns.fix_pattern: Add explicit guards: prohibit merging when input/output count > 1, when shapes contain -1, or when the pad axis under axis-combine is incorrectly identified.
verification_hints: Inspect all 'mergeable' predicates for reshape/assemble/view nodes.
Check whether multi-input/output reshape nodes are excluded.
Verify the pad-axis logic under axis-combine.

patterns.category_cn: 内存类型/地址推断错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: The memory type of a view tensor is inferred from its immediate producer instead of following the forward view chain to the original buffer.
patterns.fix_pattern: Walk the forward view chain until a non-view source is found, then propagate the inferred memory type back through the chain.
verification_hints: Dump the memory type of each view in the chain.
Check whether inference stops at the first view instead of the chain root.
Add cases with nested views ending on different memory types.

patterns.category_cn: 属性拷贝/克隆不完整
patterns.code_anti_pattern: When cloning an operation, only a subset of attributes is copied; dynamic or optional attributes are dropped.
patterns.fix_pattern: Clone all attributes (including dynamic/optional ones) from the source op to the new op.
verification_hints: Compare the attribute list of the original op and the cloned op.
Check for dynamic or optional attributes that are often omitted.
Add a UT that validates every attribute survives the clone.

patterns.category_cn: 计算图成环/自环错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A graph rewriting pass creates an edge from a node back to itself or introduces a cycle while optimizing common operations.
patterns.fix_pattern: Before adding an edge, verify source != target and that the target is not an ancestor of the source in the current DAG.
verification_hints: Run a cycle detection pass before and after the failing pass.
Inspect every place that adds a use/consumer edge during rewriting.
Add a UT where the optimization would otherwise create a self-loop.

patterns.category_cn: 多生产者/多消费者场景处理错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: When a spilled tensor has multiple producers or consumers, the pass reconnects one consumer but breaks the data flow for other outputs/multi-output ops.
patterns.fix_pattern: Rewire spilled inputs by memId so each consumer gets the correct spilled copy without disturbing unrelated outputs.
verification_hints: Draw the data-flow around the spilled tensor.
Count producers and consumers of the spilled tensor.
Check whether multi-output ops lose connections after the fix.

patterns.category_cn: 原子操作/同步条件错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: The condition that decides whether to insert or process an atomic operation is too restrictive or too permissive for split-K or multi-consumer cases.
patterns.fix_pattern: Adjust the atomic-condition predicate to cover split-K and multi-consumer scenarios correctly without over-atomicizing single-consumer cases.
verification_hints: Locate the atomic-condition predicate in the pass.
Check how it handles split-K reductions and multiple consumers.
Verify performance does not regress due to excessive atomics.

patterns.category_cn: 哈希/排序顺序敏感错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A hash key or graph hash depends on iteration order of an unordered container, causing non-deterministic behavior or missed merge opportunities.
patterns.fix_pattern: Make the hash computation order-invariant (e.g. sort operands before hashing, use commutative combine).
verification_hints: Check whether the hash combines values in container iteration order.
Run the same test multiple times and compare hashes.
Add a UT with operands in different orders that should hash to the same value.

patterns.category_cn: 调度/事件标识错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: Out-of-order scheduling logic uses the wrong branch/event identifier, causing incorrect ordering or event assignment for vector/Cube operations.
patterns.fix_pattern: Use the correct scheduling identifier (e.g. vecBranchId) for the target operation class and align event-id allocation with the hardware limit.
verification_hints: Inspect where branch/event IDs are assigned for vector vs cube ops.
Check the event-id count against hardware limits.
Add UT for out-of-order scheduling with mixed vector/cube ops.

patterns.category_cn: 直连内存路径回退错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A tensor is forced to DDR or a direct memory path is chosen for a special case, but the decision ignores parallel-consumer requirements or out-of-order constraints.
patterns.fix_pattern: Add guards for parallel-consumer requirements and OoO constraints before forcing DDR or selecting a direct memory path.
verification_hints: Check all places that force a tensor to DDR.
Verify whether parallel consumers can still be satisfied after the decision.
Test with OoO scheduling enabled.

patterns.category_cn: 新建中间 Tensor 丢失 DynValidShape
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A pass creates DDR/UB intermediate tensors from an existing view/assemble tensor but only copies dtype and shape, leaving DynValidShape empty or reset to full shape.
patterns.fix_pattern: After CreateTensorVar/AddOperation creates the intermediate tensor, immediately copy the source tensor DynValidShape with UpdateDynValidShape; also propagate validShape into ViewOpAttribute/AssembleOpAttribute/CopyOpAttribute.
verification_hints: Search newly created tensors in view/assemble/copy insertion paths and check whether UpdateDynValidShape is called.
Dump source tensor, inserted DDR tensor, inserted move-in tensor, and final consumer tensor DynValidShape.
Add a dynamic validShape case where the full shape is larger than the valid region.

patterns.category_cn: Reshape->Assemble 重排破坏 validShape
patterns.code_anti_pattern: The reorder path rewrites reshape->assemble chains without proving every middle dynamic shape is concrete and remappable, so new ops may use full shape instead of validShape.
patterns.fix_pattern: Skip reorder when required middle dynamic shape is not ConcreteValid; build assembled validShape from assemble offsets; preserve known non-reorderable chains such as sub->reshape->assemble.
verification_hints: Check TryRecordDirectReshapeAssemble and fanin/fanout reorder paths for ConcreteValid guards.
Dump generated reshape/assemble tensor shape, dyn shape, validShape, static offset, and dyn offset before and after reorder.
Add a reshape->assemble->reshape or SUB->reshape->assemble case whose validShape is smaller than full tile.

patterns.category_cn: Axis-combine 下 shape-transform OP pad 轴错误
patterns.code_anti_pattern: VIEW/ASSEMBLE/RESHAPE are handled by different branches in PadVectorForAxisCombine; ASSEMBLE may fall through to tail-axis padding although shape-transform semantics require second-last-axis padding.
patterns.fix_pattern: Centralize shape-transform opcodes in one set and apply the same second-last-axis padding rule to OP_VIEW, OP_ASSEMBLE, and OP_RESHAPE.
verification_hints: Search PadVectorForAxisCombine for scattered opcode-specific VIEW/ASSEMBLE/RESHAPE branches.
Construct cast->assemble or view->assemble axis-combine path with rawshape like [22, 1] and verify [32, 1], not [22, 32].
Run PadLocalBuffer tests with OP_VIEW, OP_ASSEMBLE, and OP_RESHAPE in the same combineAxis mode.

patterns.category_cn: 公共算子消除误删语义敏感 OP
patterns.code_anti_pattern: Common operation elimination relies on producer hash equivalence and eliminates opcodes whose semantics depend on position, aliasing, or graph-partition behavior.
patterns.fix_pattern: Maintain an explicit skip-eliminate opcode set for semantic/stateful operations such as OP_VIEW and OP_VEC_DUP; check dontTouch before hash merge.
verification_hints: Check TensorHashExist for the skip opcode set and dontTouch guard before ComputeHash.
Add two syntactically identical OP_VEC_DUP producers whose separate existence affects downstream execution.
Compare graph before and after COE to ensure skipped opcodes are not SetAsDeleted.

patterns.category_cn: MixSubgraphSplit 属性查找只按指针身份
patterns.code_anti_pattern: When propagated incast/outcast tensors are cloned, offset lookup compares shared_ptr identity only; the original mix function still has the same rawMagic but not the same pointer.
patterns.fix_pattern: First try exact tensor identity; if not found, scan original mix function operands by rawMagic and reuse the operand attribute whose offset is valid.
verification_hints: Trace FindOriginalAttrInMixFunction for propagated incast/outcast tensors added by dependency propagation.
Verify fallback by rawMagic scans both input and output operands and ignores offset == -1.
Build a split mix function where a propagated tensor is cloned but should keep the original CallOp arg offset.

patterns.category_cn: ReduceCopy 合并后内部 Tensor 仍被外部子图使用
patterns.code_anti_pattern: Auto-mix merges subgraphs based on graph latency/cycle checks but does not track whether a boundary tensor would become internal to the merged group while still used by an external subgraph.
patterns.fix_pattern: Record boundary tensor producer/consumer subgraphs, reject merge groups that make a tensor have both producer and consumer inside the merge while any endpoint remains outside, and update boundary tensor indices after each union.
verification_hints: Dump boundary tensor producerSubgraphs/consumerSubgraphs before ReduceCopy merge.
Check MarkCrossSubgraph and CheckNoExternalUseOfMergedInnerTensor for reshape-adjacent tensors.
Construct a graph where reshape output has both same-subgraph and other-subgraph consumers and verify no merge occurs.

patterns.category_cn: 动态轴默认 tile 推导溢出或卡死
patterns.code_anti_pattern: Dynamic or invalid dimensions are converted to unsigned values before power-of-two expansion; -1 becomes a huge value and left shifting may overflow to zero, causing a non-terminating loop or invalid tile.
patterns.fix_pattern: Use signed int64_t for dimension math, return 1 for cur <= 1, guard left-shift overflow, reject empty shapes, and handle non-tail <=0 dims with conservative tile 1.
verification_hints: Search default tile derivation for uint32_t dimensions, reverse loops, and shape[shapeDim - 1] access.
Test tensors with empty shape, tail dim -1, non-tail dim -1, and very large dims.
Confirm compile terminates and inserted register-copy ops get valid VecTile shapes.

patterns.category_cn: InsertSync 事件 ID 放松逻辑误判失败或迭代失效
patterns.code_anti_pattern: Event-id relaxation retries only one core-pair direction, treats no-mergeable-pair as hard failure, or iterates op.setPipe while ProcessEventIdElement mutates the same vector.
patterns.fix_pattern: Try both core-pair directions, make RelaxCvEventIdMain report failedFlag separately from Status, and iterate over a snapshot copy of setPipe when dependency processing may mutate it.
verification_hints: Inspect RelaxMultipleEventIds, RelaxCvEventIdMain, and HandleEventID for failedFlag propagation and setPipe snapshotting.
Dump CV dep map and set/wait event IDs when event-id exhaustion or deadlock occurs.
Create a case requiring multiple CV event-id relaxations with both forward and reverse core pairs.

patterns.category_cn: SplitRaw 漏处理特殊 copyout 语义 OP
patterns.code_anti_pattern: SplitRaw updates VIEW fromOffset and ASSEMBLE toOffset after replacing a raw tensor, but ignores producer ops with copyout semantics such as OP_SHMEM_GET, leaving CopyOpAttribute toOffset stale.
patterns.fix_pattern: Classify special copyout producers explicitly; for OP_SHMEM_GET update CopyOpAttribute toOffset with tensor offset, including dynamic/specified OpImmediate forms.
verification_hints: Check SplitRawTensor for UpdateProducerShmemGet or equivalent special-copyout handling.
Verify UpdateImmediateOffset handles specified and dynamic tensor offsets with matching rank.
Add a shmem_get output tensor whose raw shape is split and verify copy attr toOffset is adjusted.

patterns.category_cn: CopyOut 级联内存复用后 raw_shape 属性未刷新
patterns.code_anti_pattern: A pass reuses raw tensor storage across COPY_OUT -> HUB -> ASSEMBLE/OUTCAST, updates copyout toOffset, but leaves CopyOpAttribute raw_shape pointing to the old tensor shape.
patterns.fix_pattern: Whenever HUB/assemble memory reuse redirects tensor storage, update CopyOpAttribute raw shape from the final shared tensor DynRawShape together with offset changes.
verification_hints: Search ReplaceTensor HUB processing for SetToOffset without SetRawShape.
Dump CopyOpAttribute toOffset and raw_shape before and after HUB memory reuse.
Add COPY_OUT -> HUB -> ASSEMBLE -> OUTCAST case and confirm codegen sees the updated raw_shape.
